previousPosts:
Stop waiting for opportunities — build them yourself while you're still in college.

DEV/CRAFT gives you a 100% free, self-paced virtual internship that fits around your classes. No applications. No interviews. No fees. Just real programming projects that mirror actual industry work, instant offer letters you can add to your resume immediately, and verified certificates that prove your skills to employers.

You'll ship production-ready code, collaborate on meaningful projects, and graduate with a portfolio that speaks louder than any GPA. All on your schedule. All from your laptop.

Your developer career doesn't start after graduation. It starts the moment you decide to build something real.

Visit devcraft.fennark.xyz and claim your internship today.

#VirtualInternship #CollegeStudents #DeveloperCareer #FreeLearning #PortfolioProjects

  "post": "What if your college internship actually shipped production code?

DEV/CRAFT is a 100% free virtual internship program built for college and university students who want real software engineering experience — without paying a rupee, relocating, or waiting for a placement cell.

Each domain (Web Development, Python, Data Structures, and 14 more) runs for 6 weeks, self-paced, fully online. You build production-grade projects: responsive portfolios, e-commerce pages, API dashboards, automation scripts. Every completed project earns a verified certificate and an instant offer letter on company letterhead (MSME UDYAM-MH-23-0414056).

No selection rounds. No hidden fees. Just enroll, code, submit, and get credentials that verify on devcraft.fennark.xyz/verify.

Over 10,000 students have started. 7,000+ certificates issued. The program stays free because we believe access to quality engineering practice shouldn't be gated.

If you're a student who learns by building, this is the lowest-friction way to add shipped code to your GitHub and a verified internship to your resume.

Start here: devcraft.fennark.xyz
